dc_title: HK Repository — 事件檔案庫
dc_description:
獨立數碼保存計劃，存檔香港歷史上重要事件，供學術研究及公眾利益用途。
[EN] Independent digital preservation project archiving significant events in Hong Kong history for academic research and public interest.
dc_subject: event; timeline; people; image; news
dcx_notes: Source listed 'HK Repository' as platform — no canonical URL supplied.

dc_title: 11.26 大埔宏福苑火災紀錄庫
dc_description:
整理及保存 2025-11-26 大埔宏福苑火災的公開資料：新聞、影片、技術分析、承辦商、義工及社區支援、官方回應、後續資料。目標為公開、集中、可查證。
[EN] Compiles and preserves public records of the 2025-11-26 Wang Fuk Court fire: news, video, technical analysis, contractor records, volunteer and community support, official responses, and follow-up. Aims to be open, centralised, and verifiable.
dc_subject: timeline; videos; news; analysis; support; photos; residents; documents
dcx_notes: Uses AI tools for timeline organisation; public participation for materials; ~17,578 visitors as noted by curator.

dc_title: wang-fuk-court-fire-investigation
dc_description:
獨立、社區驅動嘅調查，運用公開證據及科學方法。結構：evidence/、analysis/、simulation/ (FDS fire dynamics)、reports/、resources/。
[EN] Independent, community-driven investigation using open evidence and scientific methods. Structure: evidence/, analysis/, simulation/ (FDS fire dynamics), reports/, resources/.
dc_subject: investigation; fire dynamics; FDS simulation; evidence; technical analysis
dcx_notes: Has stated privacy and safety policy.

dc_title: 大埔火災 全港350+資源整合網
dc_description:
以「長期、穩定」為旨，分為災民用及義工用資源，一站式人手統整。
[EN] A long-term, stable resource hub, divided into victim and volunteer sections, manually curated as a one-stop aggregator.
dc_subject: aid; resources; volunteers; victims; post-disaster

dc_title: 永遠紀念宏福苑
dc_description:
永遠紀念宏福苑 — 紀念平台。
[EN] A memorial platform dedicated to Wang Fuk Court — "Forever Remember Wang Fuk Court."
dc_subject: memorial; commemoration; remembrance
dcx_notes: Source flagged status as 'Stop' — mapped to 'inactive'.

dc_title: 宏福苑報平安【齋睇】
dc_title_alternative: Wang Fuk Court Safety Check-in (View Only)
dc_description:
由宏福苑社區曾/現工作者於災後設立，回應居民群組嘅痛苦、徬徨、焦急。
[EN] Set up after the disaster by current and former community workers at Wang Fuk Court, in response to the pain, anxiety, and distress expressed in residents' groups.
dc_subject: safety check-in; missing persons; community response
dcx_notes: Original 'Date Last updated' was 'auto-update' — recoded as ongoing in date_certainty.

dc_title: 大埔物資地圖
dc_description:
物資位置整合地圖，已停止更新（轉向其他平台）。
[EN] An integrated supplies location map; updates ceased (redirected to other platforms).
dc_subject: supplies; map; aid distribution; geolocation
dcx_notes: Curator note: 願逝者安息。願平安。願公義長存。

dc_title: Hong Kong Emergency Coordination Hub — 康福苑互助站
dc_description:
社區互助 Web App：資訊分類整合、求助/互助、長者友善設計、狀態管理、緊急支援工具。黑白灰簡約 UI。
[EN] Community mutual-aid web app: information categorisation, help requests/mutual aid, elderly-friendly accessibility design, status management, and emergency support tools. Minimalist black-white-grey UI.
dc_subject: emergency coordination; mutual aid; accessibility; elderly; web app

dc_title: Care Wang Fuk
dc_description:
民間自發製作，協助受災居民。資料來源：政府開放數據、空間數據、街坊報平安表格、官方公布。
[EN] A voluntarily created citizen platform to assist affected residents. Sources: government open data, spatial data platform, neighbourhood safety check-in forms, and official announcements.
dc_subject: resources; victims; aid; open data
dcx_notes: Source 'Platform: AI' unclear — recoded as Website.

dc_title: 大埔宏福苑火災法律支援

dc_description:
Threads 上關於 2025-11-26 大埔宏福苑火災嘅 hashtag 生態 (consolidated): #香港大火, #大埔大火, #宏福苑, #宏福苑大火, #宏福苑火災, #大埔宏福苑火災, #宏福苑火災後續, #宏福苑聽證會; 相關帳號 @wangfukmemories.
[EN] The Threads hashtag ecosystem around the 2025-11-26 Wang Fuk Court fire (consolidated): #HongKongFire, #TaiPoFire, #WangFukCourt, #WangFukCourtFire, #WangFukFireAftermath, #WangFukHearing; related account @wangfukmemories.
dc_subject: hashtag; Threads; social media; first-hand accounts; hearings
dcx_notes: Consolidated from 8 individual hashtag rows + @wangfukmemories in source Back Up sheet. See hashtags sheet for full list.
